untranslatable_reason: Broadening Formation pattern requires multi-bar trend line detection and U-shape structure analysis. Specific breakout point identification (trend line piercing or crossing prior minor highs) cannot be expressed with allowed operators and single-bar indicators. Pattern recognition requires visual/slope analysis not available in indicator set. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used bb_bandwidth expansion (widening volatility) + volume elevation as proxies for broadening pattern formation and U-shaped volume. Entry is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (BOTH directions) as per signal spec. Exit set to SMA crossover as reasonable reversal per Rule 8 since author provided no target computation. Actual pattern requires candlestick slope analysis and multi-bar trend line fitting, which exceeds available indicators.
